mano_cua.result_summary: 示例应用中有debug panel的页面（Singleplayer/Chess）主内容区无原生button/select元素，有button的页面（Lobby）无debug panel，无法在同一页面对比验证CSS样式泄漏
mano_cua.last_reasoning: querySelectorAll('button, select').length returned 1 on game page - only the MCTS select in debug panel AI tab. Main game areas use td/custom elements, not native button/select. Lobby page has buttons but no debug panel. Cannot verify CSS leak without both debug panel and main-area buttons on same page.
